name: web-based-gaming-library
description: A self-hosted, web-based game library manager with gamepad support, themes, and SteamGridDB integration.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: npx concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
